creator: steve@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

After talking with Satoshi, I have been straightened out.  He 
has implemented a MANUAL_PACKAGE_BUILD flag (which is in psutils) 
that he used to mark this as a port taht requires special attention. 
This doesn't guarantee that all variants will be built for each 
release but that a concerted effort is being put forth to do 
just that.  Thanks.
